description_long: This is a rugged, rectangular Bosch-branded toolbox made primarily of dark blue hard plastic with red accents. The front face prominently displays the Bosch logo in white and red, along with a circular emblem. The top features a sturdy, black folding handle for carrying, flanked by two red plastic latches that secure the lid. One side of the box has a large product information label, while the opposite side is mostly plain. The back face displays a large warning label with battery pictograms and the code 'UN 3481', indicating lithium battery contents. The box appears to be designed for portability and durability, suitable for storing and transporting power tools and accessories.
description: A dark blue Bosch toolbox with red latches, a black folding handle, and prominent branding and warning labels. It is made of hard plastic and designed for secure tool storage and transport.
description_view_0: Side view showing a large white product information label and the black handle on top.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the Bosch logo and emblem, with red latches and the handle clearly visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with a blue product label and minimal additional features.
description_view_3: Back view featuring a large warning label with battery pictograms and the code 'UN 3481'.
attribute_handle_type: Single folding handle, rectangular, made of black hard plastic with a textured grip for ergonomics.
attribute_latch_mechanism: Two red plastic snap latches, one on each side of the handle, with a simple press-to-release mechanism.
attribute_brand_logo: Front face, large white and red 'BOSCH' text with circular emblem to the left.
attribute_compartment_configuration: Internal compartments are not visible, but the size and design imply a single large main compartment with possible internal dividers or trays typical of toolboxes.
attribute_external_labeling: Side: Product information label with text and barcodes
Back: Large warning label with battery pictograms and 'UN 3481'
